verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I was down as low as one could go, I had no strength of my own; Everything I worked for all my life, Everything I loved was gone; The lowest valley of my life. I was flat on my face, But then the great hand of Jesus Reached down and picked me up, Oh yes! I know grace.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Do you know grace, Amazing grace? Have you heard how sweet the sound? There are many dangers, toils and snares, We’ve already come, Look where you came from And where you are, And I’ll ask you, “Do you know grace? ”

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When it comes time for Him to take His Bride, To that evergreen shore, And He chooses you and I To live in that land forever more; When we’ve been there ten thousand years, And you see me in that place, Oh! you could ask me this question again, I’ll say, “Yes! I remember grace. ”
